title: Email to Multiple Recipients

posts.author: PeteA (Pete Ambrose)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please create the following feature:

When Status changes to Something >> Send and email to Someone and CC Someone Else and CC Someone Else and CC…

This is a much needed feature for companies looking to update multiple people via email when a status changes. It would be even better if we had the option to either CC multiple people on the email OR simply send an email to a group of people. We need the ability to create distribution lists for a status change. Sending an email to a single recipient is great but doesn’t do the trick for most email applications.

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @PeteA - right now through our integrations we can email several users, but we do not the ability to CC as you mentioned.

I’ll be sure to pass the suggestion over to our team and see if it’s something we can do in the future.

Best,
Daniel

posts.author: PeteA (Pete Ambrose)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Daniel,

Thanks for responding. Does the current function allow us to send 1 email to multiple people or is the same email sent separately to multiple people?

posts.author: donaldcornel (Donald Cornel)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any plans on the roadmap the ability to CC multiple emails? This is a much needed for cases that the CCs need to interact within a single thread of email.

posts.author: bouchboud (Nicolas Bouchard)
posts.cookedHtml: Any development yet? I think we are all waiting for that feature.

posts.author: DiversityVC (Diversity VC)
posts.cookedHtml: Does anyone have any updates on this topic? Really looking forward to having this feature.

posts.author: noam.lapidot (Noam Lapidot)
posts.cookedHtml:
@DiversityVC

Hey all,

If I may suggest a workaround, this automation exists is SuperMail allowing you to CC and BCC directly from a Monday board automation.

It’s a marketplace app, you will also enjoy other benefits, such as rich text design for automated emails, file attachments. You can also send to mirrored columns and include buttons in your email that will trigger a status change in board, great for approvals.

You can try for free
